reviews.comment:

A place to stop and continue your journey. There's a little bit of everything.

reviews.comment:
Ideal para viajantes o para una parada nocturna, buena atención,  buen restaurant y buen precio.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for travelers or an overnight stop, good service, a good restaurant, and a good price.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame the breakfast is so bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeDVYcDRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelentes instalaciones. Precios algo elevados. Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent facilities. Prices are a bit high. Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcjhQM0hREAE

reviews.comment:
Habitaciones confortables y bien mantenidas. El desayuno es escaso teniendo en cuenta el precio. Relación precio/calidad? Es caro para lo que brinda, tanto el hospedaje como el restaurante. Aclaro que soy socio del ACA y así y todo es bastante caro y más que un beneficio para el socio lo tomo como un castigo para el que no lo es.

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable and well-maintained rooms. Breakfast is meager considering the price. Value for money? It's expensive for what it offers, both the accommodation and the restaurant. I should clarify that I'm an ACA member, and even so, it's quite expensive, and more than a benefit for members, I see it as a punishment for non-members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnb3ZQRnRBRRAB
